brand_identity.name: MeshSupport AI
brand_identity.persona: The Pilot's Cockpit - Precise, Calm, Intelligent
brand_identity.visual_style: Dark Technical SaaS (Deep Slate + Electric Violet)
brand_identity.description: An AI-powered IT command center that bridges human language with machine execution. It feels like a futuristic terminal—clean, dark, and highly responsive.

typography.installation: Imports via Google Fonts in index.css

usage_rules.gradients: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial glows for emphasis.
usage_rules.shadows: Colored shadows for primary actions (e.g., button glow).
usage_rules.glass: Use backdrop-blur-xl with bg-slate-950/70 for overlays and sticky headers.

layout_system.spacing_scale: Relaxed. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. gap-6 for grids.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-6

inputs.base: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg h-11

chat_bubbles.user: bg-slate-800 text-slate-100 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[80%]
chat_bubbles.ai: bg-primary/10 border border-primary/20 text-slate-100 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[80%] shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(99,102,241,0.1)]
chat_bubbles.system: text-xs text-slate-500 text-center w-full py-2 font-mono

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-trust IT tool. Do not use 'cute' or 'playful' designs. Keep it rigid, gridded, and fast. The User Interface should feel like a specialized tool (like Linear or Vercel).
instructions_to_main_agent.customer_portal: Focus on the 'Chat' input. It should be the largest element on the screen. Hide complexity. Use Yes/No pills for quick answers.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_dashboard: Density is key here. Use tables with sticky headers. Use monospace fonts for logs and command outputs. Status indicators (green dots) must be prominent.
instructions_to_main_agent.meshcentral_integration: Visually represent the 'Connection' to the remote machine. When a command runs, show a terminal-like output window.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
